turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. Meri anti-seizure medication ka refill chahiye. Mujhe epilepsy hai aur Doctor ne kaha tha regular lena zaroori hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul samajhta hoon — yeh medication kabhi bhi band nahi honi chahiye. Aapka naam aur doctor?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Ganesh Vaidya. Dr. Leena Verma mere neurologist hain.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, record mein dekh raha hoon. Levetiracetam 500mg last prescribed 8 weeks ago. Main Dr. Verma ko urgent refill request bhejta hoon abhi. Anti-seizure medication mein hum delay nahi karte.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dr. Verma zyaadatar aaj ya kal tak respond karti hain urgent cases mein. Hum aapko call karenge jaise hi approval aaye. Abhi kitne dino ki dawai bachi hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Theek hai, koi dikkat nahi. Request urgent mark ho gayi. Hum aaj shaam tak contact karenge aapko.
